verdict.note: Real Chromium: backend 'session-c157' -> tab title 'session-c157 · SpexCode' and the backend name is present in the page; no backend -> shipped title 'SpexCode'. Re-confirmed after the incidental index.html touch from the tab-icon favicon change (title logic unchanged).
HUD brand reads $ spexcode, tab title spexcode · SpexCode, board header // spexcode {sessions} — all three from projectTitle(board)/board.project
HUD brand $ spexcode == tab title spexcode · SpexCode == board header // spexcode {sessions}, all from projectTitle(board)

Re-measured after the index.html first-paint edit: default title 'dashboard-shell-4804 · SpexCode' + HUD '$ dashboard-shell-4804' from folder basename; dashboard.title override → 'Theme Probe · SpexCode' + '$ Theme Probe'; unreachable backend → plain 'SpexCode' tab with the fail-loud panel; board without a project name → HUD '$ spec-dashboard'. Scratch backend on the worktree (:8799), real browser.

Re-measured after the index.html theme-script edit: default names the backend folder (document.title 'scratchproj · SpexCode', HUD '$ scratchproj'); dashboard.title=Orbital overrides both ('Orbital · SpexCode', '$ Orbital') with the suffix kept; unreachable backend shows the fail-loud panel with the plain 'SpexCode' index.html fallback; a board stripped of its project name mounts the HUD's plain 'spec-dashboard' label. Scratch spex serve (:8911) + worktree vite (:5199), headless Chromium.

Re-measured on 7056f575. Folder default: 'dashboard-shell-34ae · SpexCode' / HUD '$ dashboard-shell-34ae'; dashboard.title=Orbital Deck overrides both with the · SpexCode suffix kept; unreachable backend shows the fail-loud panel + retry with the plain 'SpexCode' index.html fallback; a board stripped of its project name mounts the HUD's own '$ spec-dashboard' label. Scratch spex serve :8931 + worktree vite :5175, headless Chromium; config restored after.

Re-measured after this session's index.html favicon edits (title path untouched). Folder default: '我们现在这个图标太丑了-6bbb · SpexCode' / HUD '$ 我们现在这个图标太丑了-6bbb'; dashboard.title='Orbital Deck' overrides both keeping the · SpexCode suffix; backend unreachable → plain 'SpexCode' fallback, no HUD; board stripped of project (graph intercepted, SSE blocked) → plain title + HUD '$ spec-dashboard'. Worktree stack vite:5173 + spex serve:8903, headless Chromium; config restored.

Re-measured after removing the fixed '· SpexCode' suffix: isolated real gateway + two project backends through headless Chromium. Global tab reads exactly 'Projects'; /p/<id>/ tabs read exactly 'Atlas Lab' / 'Rocket Yard'; titles route-invariant across rail routes, follow live scope switches, gated scope titles by URL project id and unlocked guest by its authorized board identity; wrong-board negative control and favicon identity intact; desktop 1440px + mobile 390px.
